body.title: CC walk: Igor verifies confab_scanner wiring in ConsultSession
body.result: Target ticket already done. Walk admin close.
body.description:
Target: T-consult-confab-scan-wiring-verify. Stale proposal+approved_plan cleared. Touches consult.py + engram_tools/.

Checklist:
1. Set priority=0.95 on target; watch Igor claim
2. PLAN: consult.py + engram_tools/ — not HIGH-inertia
3. Watch: deposit_engram → synthetic consult → assert confab_flags non-empty
4. If wiring broken: trace ConsultSession.ask() → fix scanner hookup
5. Commit + done

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/consult.py, lab/claudecode/engram_tools/
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** IN — scaffold T-consult-confab-scan-wiring-verify
**Test plan:** target done.
